name: Kotone's Hypno Slave
description: You've become Kotone's hypnotized slave, completely enthralled with the feeling of being put into hypnotic trances, decreasing your trance res by 20%. But you gained 5% res against sleep and charm, 3 willpower, and 20 max arousal. When afflicted with trance, you start the counter at 5 instead of 10, no longer start to come out your trance naturally and have to rely on items to escape it, and have a 10% extra chance to lose your turn if you're completely entranced. You also gained 10 fetish in Kissing, Breasts, Ass, Legs, Feet, and Monstrous.
